meta.title: Enshrouded Skill Planner
meta.description: A skill tree planner for the game Enshrouded.

about.title: About
about.description1: This tool was created solely to aid Enshrouded players in sharing skill trees and builds conveniently. I'm not affiliated with Keen Games and do not hold any rights to the Enshrouded game.
about.description2: This tool is open source and available for anyone who wants to contribute. If you're looking to contribute, you can go to the <githubLink>GitHub repository</githubLink> or you can join our <discordLink>Discord server</discordLink>.
about.description3: Special thanks to <glitchizLink>@Glitchiz</glitchizLink> for giving me some of the assets used in this tool.

export.title: Share Your Build
export.noSkills: Unlock skills in the tree to generate a share link.

import.title: Import skills
import.warning: Only import builds from sources you trust.

settings.title: Settings
settings.audioBlocked: Audio was blocked by your browser. Allow audio for this site in your browser settings and try again.

refundConfirm.title: Refund skills
refundConfirm.message: This will also refund {{count}} connected skill(s). Continue?

resetConfirm.title: Reset skill tree
resetConfirm.message: This will remove all selected skills. Are you sure?

skillCap.title: Skill point cap reached
skillCap.message: You have reached the maximum number of skill points. Refund some skills before unlocking new ones.
